rules.name: minimum_age
rules.description: Applicant must be at least 18 years old

rules.name: maximum_age
rules.description: Applicant must be under 75 years old

rules.name: hard_reject_credit_score
rules.description: Credit score below 500 is an automatic rejection

rules.name: minimum_income
rules.description: Annual income must be at least $15,000

rules.name: loan_to_income_ratio
rules.description: Loan amount must not exceed 5x annual income

rules.name: strong_credit_auto_approve
rules.description: Credit score above 750 with income above $40,000 qualifies for automatic approval
